titleStmt.title: Corpus Português de Jornais Históricos PressMint-PT, [PressMint SAMPLE]
Portuguese Historical Newspaper Corpus PressMint-PT, [PressMint SAMPLE]

respStmt.resp: Codificação em XML TEI para PressMint

funder.orgName: Infraestrutura de Investigação para a Ciência e Tecnologia da Linguagem PORTULAN CLARIN
Research Infrastructure for the Science and Technology of Language PORTULAN CLARIN

availability.p: O corpus é disponibilizado com a licença Licença Creative Commons Atribuição 4.0 Internacional.
This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.

bibl.author: Autores e restantes dados a confirmar
bibl.title: Corpus de periódicos portugueses (1808-1945) Verifica 1.0
Corpus of Portuguese periodicals (1808-1945) Verifica 1.0

projectDesc.p: O projeto PressMint tem como objetivo compilar um conjunto multilingue, anotado e interoperável de corpora de jornais históricos europeus do início do século XX. Os corpora do PressMint estarão disponíveis gratuitamente, tanto para download em diversos formatos e versões, como através de várias ferramentas de análise de corpora online.

The PressMint project aims to compile a multilingual, annotated and interoperable set of corpora of European historical newspapers from around the start of the 20th century. The PressMint corpora will be openly available, both for download in a variety of instances and formats, as well as via several online corpus analysis tools.

quotation.p: Quotation marks have been left in the text and are not explicitly marked up.

hyphenation.p: Hyphenated words have been left in the text and are not explicitly marked-up as such.

segmentation.p: The texts are split by page breaks and then segmented into paragraphs.

application.label: Lemmatization and POS tagging
application.desc: Lemmatization and POS tagging carried out using UDPipe.https://github.com/ufal/udpipe.git

application.label: NER marking
application.desc: NER (PER, LOC, ORG, MISC) marking carried out NameTag.https://github.com/ufal/nametag3.git
